name: Jordan Clark
abilities: ★ Bard of the Bonfire — each night the clan gathers, the guitars come out, and Jordo passes the torch in song. His hair, they say, is god-like.

2025 — Triple Crown. Individual Net Champion (136.5), Pairs Champion with Dan Character (the fabled Double-D), and reigning Sunday match-play king (4 & 2). Net finishes — '22 · 13th   '23 · 15th   '25 · 1st. (Missed '24.)
flavor: “We'll sing some bangers this weekend — multiple guitars, hopefully.”
caption: Jordan Clark · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
